title: Deep Searches
carouselText: Deep Searches is built as a React + Vite SPA with a Cloudflare Worker edge proxy for LLM and open-data calls, plus KV for shared settings and access metadata. We chose this stack for fast frontend iteration, low operations overhead, and same-origin security controls; the tradeoff is tighter Cloudflare platform coupling and extra CORS/Access policy coordination. Retrieval is source-grounded with compliance and evidence gates, which improves trust and citation quality but can soft-fail when authoritative public records are sparse or endpoint availability is inconsistent.
